Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) re: notice by 1st class mail and email. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF THOMAS CORCORAN'S Joint Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is GRANTED.

Counsel for Plaintiff to fix/submit a proposed order to include notice by email and final approval hearing date of 1/20/2022 at 9:30am in dept 302 via email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.
